title: TestNUX — test-plan.md Frontmatter
description: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the YAML frontmatter block at the top of every test-plan.md file. Used by `testnux validate` to lint test-pass folders.

status.description: Execution status of this test plan. Pick exactly one from the allowed taxonomy.

industry.description: Industry profile driving the standards-alignment table. Controls which standards appear in the HTML report footer.

r_ids.description: List of product requirement IDs (R-XX) that this test plan covers. Must match IDs in requirements/REQUIREMENTS.md.

items.description: A single requirement ID in the format R-<integer> (e.g. R-42, R-100).

tc_prefix.description: TC ID prefix used throughout this plan (e.g. 'LOGIN', 'DASH', 'ADM-SET'). Must be UPPER-KEBAB-CASE, 1-12 characters.

_review_required.description: Set true when the plan was auto-generated or not yet human-reviewed. The validate command emits a warning when this is true and status is READY or higher.

uat_status.description: UAT sign-off status. Used in v0.3 for the stakeholder sign-off workflow.

industry_standards.description: Explicit list of standards exercised by this test plan. Overrides the industry profile defaults if provided.

slug.description: Kebab-case page identifier matching the testing-log folder name suffix (e.g. 'dashboard-login').
